positive: An intricate, stylized illustration featuring a majestic space nebula transforming into a sprawling forest canopy. The composition must be centrally composed, with the nebula rendered in deep indigos, celestial blues, and ethereal purples, subtly blending into rich emerald greens, sapphire blues, and teal greens of the organic forest elements. Key elements include bioluminescent flora, geometric space patterns interacting with swirling wood grain, and stylized constellations visible through 'atmospheric' patches of the leaves. Use a highly detailed linocut style mixed with glowing watercolor techniques. Strong contrast is essential, emphasizing the silhouette of the branching nebula-trees against a slightly muted, dark background. The entire image should read like a wearable patch or seamless pattern element. High contrast, vaporwave sci-fi botanical feel, symmetrical composition.
negative: artifacts, blur, low resolution, text, watermark, logo, signature, blurry, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, monochrome, faded, dirty
